path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

oneOf.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

command.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

description.description: Description explains the suggested next step in plain language.

NextAction.description: NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the active, archived, or last-landed plan path relevant to the current status resolution.

local_state_path.description: LocalStatePath is the plan-local control-plane state path when one exists.

review_round_id.description: ReviewRoundID is the active review round identifier when review is in flight.

ci_record_id.description: CIRecordID is the latest CI evidence record identifier when known.

publish_record_id.description: PublishRecordID is the latest publish evidence record identifier when known.

sync_record_id.description: SyncRecordID is the latest sync evidence record identifier when known.

last_landed_plan_path.description: LastLandedPlanPath is the most recent landed plan path when the repository is otherwise idle.

last_landed_at.description: LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan.

StatusArtifacts.description: StatusArtifacts lists stable paths or identifiers related to the current status result.

current_step.description: CurrentStep is the first unfinished plan step when one exists.

revision.description: Revision is the current plan-local revision number.

reopen_mode.description: ReopenMode is the active reopen mode when a reopen repair path is in effect.

review_kind.description: ReviewKind is the review kind for the active review round.

review_trigger.description: ReviewTrigger is the derived reason label for the active review round.

review_title.description: ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for the active review round when one exists.

review_status.description: ReviewStatus summarizes the aggregate review state for the current node.

archive_blocker_count.description: ArchiveBlockerCount reports how many archive-readiness blockers are still present.

publish_status.description: PublishStatus summarizes the latest publish evidence state.

pr_url.description: PRURL is the currently known pull request URL for the candidate branch.

ci_status.description: CIStatus summarizes the latest CI evidence state.

sync_status.description: SyncStatus summarizes the latest remote-sync evidence state.

land_pr_url.description: LandPRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase.

land_commit.description: LandCommit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase.

StatusFacts.description: StatusFacts carries selected derived details that help interpret a status node without dumping the full local state model.

ok.description: OK reports whether the command succeeded.

command.description: Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the current state.

state.description: State is the canonical workflow position resolved for the current worktree.

facts.description: Facts carries selected high-signal derived details that help explain the current node.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to stable paths or identifiers that help the caller locate related contract artifacts.

oneOf.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

next_actions.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

blockers.description: Blockers lists state issues that block ordinary execution progression.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-blocking workflow reminders or ambiguity notes.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented full state resolution.

StatusResult.description: StatusResult is the JSON result returned by `harness status`.

current_node.description: CurrentNode is the resolved v0.2 workflow node for the current worktree.

StatusState.description: StatusState is the canonical workflow node returned by `harness status`.
